title: varronia lantanifolia
intro: Varronia lantanifolia, also known as the "Wild Lantana" or "Egbo", is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots have been used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Furthermore, Varronia lantanifolia is also said to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
